perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a black flat cap, glasses, and a pink Roots t-shirt stands in front of a gray curtain, pointing his finger at the camera. Large text and a LINE icon overlay appear. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a mobile phone display counter showing several vivo and other brand smartphones. (3) The man returns to the center frame, gesturing as he lists three points. Cartoon stickers of a thief, a police officer, and a woman crying appear around him chronologically to emphasize his points.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic, upbeat electronic music track begins. A male voice speaks rapidly and with an advisory tone about LINE security. (2) The music continues as the man mentions a retail recommendation. (3) The speaker lists three specific scam phrases in a structured manner, maintaining a high volume and steady pace. The music remains consistent until the clip ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'LINE 如果收到這三句話' (If you receive these three sentences on LINE) - Hook. (2) Decorative Text: '趕快封鎖對方' (Block the person immediately) - Warning tone. (3) Functional Text: '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone to buy mobile phones at miko) - Promotional hook. (4) Functional Text: '第一！不要點選再次登入', '第二！刪除LINE App才能防毒', '第三！系統繁忙 稍後再次登入' (Three specific scam lines to watch out for).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Store Promo -> Educational Scam Breakdown -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male with short hair, wearing glasses, a black flat cap, and a pink t-shirt with a Roots brand logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a neutral indoor setting with gray curtains; secondary background is a retail display for smartphones with various branding signs.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Commercial Transition -> Sequential Explanation -> Final Warning
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate the audience about common phishing scam messages used on the LINE platform while simultaneously promoting a specific mobile phone retailer (miko).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly recommends buying phones at 'miko' and shows their storefront display.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host 'Tim' identifies himself with the brand '3c有意思tim哥' and his signature flat cap style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy tech-vlog style editing designed for high retention on social media platforms like TikTok or Facebook Reels.
